title: Consent to service of process
doc_html:
§3415.7.  Consent to service of process

Each entity applying for a license as an appraisal management company in this state shall complete an irrevocable Uniform Consent to Service of Process as prescribed by the board.

Acts 2009, No. 502, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2010.
